entities.name: FERTILIZER APPLICATORS
entities.description: Devices used for the distribution of fertilizer in agricultural fields

entities.name: UNIFORM APPLICATION OF FERTILIZER
entities.description: The process of applying fertilizer evenly across a target area

entities.name: PRECISION OF FERTILIZER APPLICATION
entities.description: The degree of accuracy and consistency in the amount of fertilizer applied

entities.name: EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Controlled scientific trials conducted to test agricultural hypotheses

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL STATION
entities.description: A research facility dedicated to agricultural studies

entities.name: PHYSICAL CONDITION OF FERTILIZER
entities.description: The physical properties of the fertilizer that influence its handling and application

entities.name: PARTICLE SIZE
entities.description: The size of the fertilizer particles, which affects flow and distribution

entities.name: ATMOSPHERIC HUMIDITY
entities.description: The amount of moisture in the air, which can affect fertilizer behavior

entities.name: HYGROSCOPICITY OF FERTILIZER
entities.description: The ability of the fertilizer to absorb moisture from the atmosphere

entities.name: METERING MECHANISM
entities.description: The mechanical system in an applicator that controls the rate of fertilizer delivery
